languages.text: "Храни вас {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}! Я буду ждать и следить, чтобы огонь не подобрался слишком близко к машине".

traits.locale_text: "Храни вас {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}! Я буду ждать и следить, чтобы огонь не подобрался слишком близко к машине".

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."
languages.original_text: "Храни вас {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}! Я буду ждать и следить, чтобы огонь не подобрался слишком близко к машине".

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."
"God-Emperor protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."
"God-Emperor protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

languages.text: 「神皇帝があなたを守り給え！私はここで待っていて、火がシャトルに近づきすぎないようにする」
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝があなたを守り給え！私はここで待っていて、火がシャトルに近づきすぎないようにするわ。」

languages.text: «¡Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} le proteja! Esperaré aquí y me aseguraré de que el fuego no se acerca a la lanzadera».
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} le proteja! Esperaré aquí y me aseguraré de que el fuego no se acerca a la lanzadera».

languages.text: “愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑您！我就在这里守着，确保不让火烧到穿梭机。”
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

traits.locale_text: “愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑您！我就在这里守着，确保不让火烧到穿梭机。”

languages.text: "Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} schütze Euch! Ich werde hier warten und sicherstellen, dass das Feuer dem Shuttle nicht zu nahe kommt."
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

traits.locale_text: "Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} schütze Euch! Ich werde hier warten und sicherstellen, dass das Feuer dem Shuttle nicht zu nahe kommt."

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} sizi korusun! Ben burada bekleyeceğim, ateşin mekiğe çok yaklaşmadığından emin olacağım."
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you! I'll wait here and make sure the fire doesn't get too close to the shuttle."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} sizi korusun! Ben burada bekleyeceğim, ateşin mekiğe çok yaklaşmadığından emin olacağım."

languages.text: « Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} vous protège ! Je vais rester ici et m'assurer que les flammes ne s'approchent pas trop de la navette. »
